title: Sign in with a phone number and complete profile setup
description: This verifies that a valid phone-based login can proceed through OTP verification and profile setup before routing the user onward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Submit the login form
Enter the valid OTP code
Complete the profile setup fields
Submit the profile setup form
Verify the user is routed to the appropriate authenticated destination

title: Redirect unauthenticated visitors from member dashboard to login
description: A visitor without an active session is redirected away from the member dashboard and cannot access protected content until signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /member
Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify member dashboard content is not displayed

title: Toggle the theme on the public site and keep it across navigation
description: A guest can switch to dark mode on the public site and see the preference stay applied after moving to another public page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle the theme to dark mode
Verify the dark theme is applied
Click the link to open the privacy policy
Verify the dark theme remains applied

title: Enter the app through demo mode
description: This verifies that a user can access the product through demo mode and land in the appropriate authenticated area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Select demo mode access
Verify the user is redirected to an authenticated destination
Verify protected app content is displayed

title: Return a signed-in member to the member dashboard after login
description: A signed-in member who starts from the protected member route is sent to login and then returned to the member dashboard after authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /member
Verify the login screen is displayed
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the member dashboard is displayed

title: Toggle the theme on the login page
description: A guest can switch to light mode on the login page and see the UI update immediately across the app shell.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Toggle the theme to light mode
Verify the light theme is applied

title: Join onboarding with a valid invite code
description: This verifies that a new authenticated user can join an existing group by invite code and is routed to the correct protected dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credentials required for a new authenticated user
Submit the login form
Choose the option to join a group by invite code
Fill in a valid invite code
Submit the onboarding form
Verify the user reaches the correct authenticated dashboard
Verify the onboarding form is completed

title: Start onboarding by creating a new group
description: This verifies that a newly authenticated user can choose to create a group during onboarding and reach the correct protected destination afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credentials required for a new authenticated user
Submit the login form
Choose the option to create a new group
Complete the onboarding details
Submit the onboarding form
Verify the user reaches the correct authenticated dashboard for the new group
Verify onboarding completion content is no longer shown

title: Load the admin dashboard after sign in
description: This verifies that an authenticated admin can reach the dashboard and see the core analytics and management sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credentials required for an admin account
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify summary cards, analytics charts, member information, and expense management content are displayed

title: Create a new group from onboarding
description: A new authenticated user can create a group from onboarding and is routed to the correct dashboard afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the onboarding link if prompted after login
Choose to create a new group
Complete the group creation form with valid details
Verify the group is created
Verify the user is routed to the appropriate dashboard

title: Join a group with a valid invite code
description: A new authenticated user can join an existing group through onboarding and land on the member dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the onboarding link if prompted after login
Choose to join a group with an invite code
Fill in a valid invite code
Submit the join group form
Verify the invite is accepted
Verify the member dashboard is displayed

title: Use the member dashboard to add a new expense
description: This verifies that a member can review their dashboard and submit a new expense that becomes visible in their personal ledger context.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credentials required for a member account
Submit the login form
Complete the add expense form with valid details
Submit the new expense
Verify the new expense is shown in the group ledger or personal expense summary
Verify the member dashboard remains visible

title: Open the member dashboard as an authenticated member
description: An authenticated member can reach the member dashboard and see their personal summary, group ledger, and expense entry form.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the member dashboard link if prompted after login
Verify personal expense summary is displayed
Verify the group ledger and add expense form are displayed

title: Reject an incorrect one-time code on login
description: This verifies that an incorrect OTP is rejected and the user stays on the login flow with an authentication error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Submit the login form
Enter an incorrect OTP code
Submit the OTP form
Verify an authentication error is displayed
Verify the login flow remains active

title: Start signup from the landing page CTA
description: A guest can move from the landing page into the login flow using the main call to action.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary signup call to action
Verify the login screen is displayed

title: Reject an invalid phone number on login
description: This verifies that an invalid phone number is blocked and the user remains on the login page with validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with an invalid phone number
Submit the login form
Verify a phone number validation error is displayed
Verify the login page remains visible

title: Block invalid expense submission on the member dashboard
description: A member who submits incomplete or invalid expense details sees validation feedback and no expense is created.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the member dashboard link if prompted after login
Submit the add expense form with incomplete required details
Verify an expense validation error is displayed
Verify no new expense entry is created

title: Open the public homepage and reach the login page
description: This verifies that a guest can view the landing page and use the primary path to reach the login experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call to action to start login
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Submit an incomplete support contact form
description: A guest submitting the contact form without required details sees validation feedback and the message is not submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Submit the contact form without filling required fields
Verify validation errors are displayed
Verify the message is not submitted

title: Show static pricing content on the landing page
description: A guest can review the public pricing section and see the expected plan details on the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the pricing cards are displayed
Verify the plan limit and benefit details are displayed

title: Review an empty expense search result on the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that an admin can search or filter expenses to no matches and see an empty state instead of the normal table data.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the credentials required for an admin account
Submit the login form
Use the expense search or filter controls to request no matching results
Verify an empty state is displayed for the expense table
Verify the dashboard remains available

title: Keep invalid invite codes on onboarding
description: An authenticated user who enters an invalid or expired invite code sees an error and remains on onboarding.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the onboarding link if prompted after login
Choose to join a group with an invite code
Fill in an invalid invite code
Submit the join group form
Verify an invite code error is displayed
Verify the onboarding screen remains visible

title: Open contact support and submit a valid message
description: This verifies that a guest can reach the support form and successfully submit a complete contact request.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the footer link for the contact page
Fill in the contact form with valid details and a message
Submit the contact form
Verify a successful submission confirmation is visible
Verify the contact form is no longer in its initial state

title: View the privacy policy
description: A guest can open the privacy policy and return to the public site after reading it.

steps.description: Navigate to /privacy
Verify the privacy policy content is displayed
Click the link to return to the public site
Verify the public landing page is displayed

title: Review public policy pages from the homepage
description: This verifies that a guest can move from the landing page to the privacy and terms pages through the footer navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the footer link for the privacy page
Verify the privacy page is displayed
Click the footer link for the terms page
Verify the terms page is displayed

title: View the terms of service
description: A guest can open the terms page and then navigate to support contact for questions.

steps.description: Navigate to /terms
Verify the terms content is displayed
Click the link to contact support
Verify the support contact page is displayed

title: Show validation for an incomplete contact form
description: This verifies that the contact page prevents submission when required information is missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Submit the contact form without completing required fields
Verify contact form validation errors are displayed
Verify the form remains available for correction

title: Use the default theme when saved theme data is invalid
description: An authenticated user opening the dashboard with invalid saved theme data still sees the page render in the default theme.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify the default theme is applied

title: Fall back to static pricing content when client pricing state is unavailable
description: If pricing data does not populate from client state, the landing page still shows the built-in pricing content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the pricing section is displayed
Verify the landing page still shows plan content

title: See a public route miss handled on the site
description: This verifies that an invalid public route is handled gracefully and the user stays within the public experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Navigate to an invalid public route
Verify a route miss or not found state is displayed
Verify the public site shell remains available

title: Footer navigation links open correct pages
description: Verify that all three footer links on the landing page (Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Contact) navigate to the correct routes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer section
Click the Privacy Policy link in the footer
Verify the URL changes to /privacy and the privacy policy page is displayed
Navigate back to /
Scroll to the footer and click the Terms of Service link
Verify the URL changes to /terms and terms of service content is displayed
Navigate back to /
Scroll to the footer and click the Contact link
Verify the URL changes to /contact and the contact form is displayed

title: Privacy policy page loads and displays content
description: Verify that /privacy loads successfully and displays meaningful privacy policy content including headings.

steps.description: Navigate directly to /privacy
Verify the page loads without errors
Verify there is at least one heading visible on the page
Verify the page contains privacy-related content such as data collection, user rights, or similar policy text

title: Terms of service page loads and displays content
description: Verify that /terms loads successfully and shows terms of service content including relevant sections.

steps.description: Navigate directly to /terms
Verify the page loads without errors
Verify there is at least one heading visible on the page
Verify the page contains terms-related content such as user responsibilities, limitations, or acceptable use

title: Contact form shows validation errors when submitted empty
description: Verify that submitting the contact form with all fields empty triggers visible validation error messages and does not submit.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Verify the contact form is displayed with name, email, and message fields
Click the submit button without filling any field
Verify validation error messages are shown for the required fields
Verify the user remains on the /contact page and no success message is shown

title: Unknown route redirects to landing page
description: Verify that navigating to a non-existent route (e.g. /nonexistent) redirects the user back to the landing page at /.

steps.description: Navigate to /this-route-does-not-exist
Verify the user is redirected to the landing page at /
Verify the landing page hero section is displayed

title: Login page Back to Home button navigates to landing page
description: Verify that the Back to Home or back navigation button on the login page returns the user to the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Verify the login page is displayed with a phone input
Click the Back to Home or back arrow button
Verify the user is navigated back to the landing page at /
Verify the landing page hero section is visible

title: OTP input renders 6 individual digit boxes
description: Verify that after a phone number is submitted on the login page, exactly 6 individual OTP input boxes appear for the user to enter the code.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Enter a valid phone number in the phone input field (e.g. +919876543210)
Click the Get OTP or Send OTP button
Verify that 6 individual OTP digit input boxes are displayed on screen
Verify the phone input step is no longer visible and the OTP step is shown

title: Dark mode preference is saved in localStorage
description: Verify that toggling to dark mode on the landing page writes the value 'dark' to the samplebook_theme key in localStorage.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Find and click the theme toggle button to switch to dark mode
Verify the page visually switches to dark mode (dark background applied)
Verify that localStorage key 'samplebook_theme' is set to the value 'dark'
Reload the page
Verify dark mode is still active after the page reload confirming persistence
